message:
feat(search): add decision-theoretic budget controller with evidence ledger

Introduce a Bayesian expected-loss framework for hybrid search budget
allocation. The new `derive_with_decision` path produces an explainable
`CandidateBudgetDerivation` containing posterior beliefs, per-action
expected losses, and the chosen action — all emitted to an opt-in JSONL
evidence ledger (`AM_EVIDENCE_LEDGER_PATH`).

Also includes:
- New `evidence_ledger` module in core with append-only JSONL writer
- Batch LRU eviction via `evict_front_for_insert` (range-drain instead
  of repeated O(n) shift_remove_index)
- Remove unnecessary braces in TUI highlight_style calls

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
